Initializer# init(jsGlobalContextRef:)

iOS 16.0+iPadOS 16.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
init!(jsGlobalContextRef: JSGlobalContextRef!)
```

## [Return Value](/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSContext/init(jsGlobalContextRef:)#return-value)

The JSContext equivalent of the provided JSGlobalContextRef.

## [Discussion](/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSContext/init(jsGlobalContextRef:)#discussion)

Create a JSContext, wrapping its C API counterpart.
